title: Lead Revenue Manager at Devyani International

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Devyani International
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Delhi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International:
Devyani International is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International!
